textByHash.073e9768f6db6b6515ec8b9a563fa9253dbf3b87: Suit yourself, but those sails won't fix themselves you know.
textByHash.08540e854bb9f32f06987fe4e2128d0daccf5533: Well, I'd be able to fix more if you had more.
textByHash.0ad1d8f6451d3999836a2c42953a68051c6bbbeb: Tie off the end there and...
textByHash.2ceea2c612e683354941c194f308454c96db3bfd: Well come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.491f08d27e5bddde124491ca5e563fa010678003: There we have it! They might not look the prettiest, but they'll be sturdy enough for the job at least.
textByHash.6007a9bf29f4e8ad0e9426a3412ef461528feafc: Oh, in that case, I'll help you out, just so long as you can do me a small favour.
textByHash.881e64744500acda7833107571e9019d363371ac: Nilsal. Here to do some crafting? I've got some supplies that might help you if so.
textByHash.b3ead012974e6b29390d47910bf7b11c2685bbd7: Take care now iknami, and come by the shop whenever you need any crafting bits and bobs.
textByHash.bd6d11dfdd7aeda8f5697c5bb7f0795956bfe8c5: Grab some of that, then pull that through...
textByHash.c248192a48c77c4bdc8f04715555ac546b63bca4: Are you ready to do that small favour I mentioned?
textByHash.c26370e08a8f31a536c76c42997130858b1122de: Perfect. Now hand those sails over.
textByHash.efcbfe73370e8b9e8787f28f2aaa281d5b7277aa: All I ask is that you tell the charter crew that Artima says thanks for the latest shipment they brought in!
textByHash.fa24a44218fea215da18a3282a8d38aa2171e879: I already fixed them for you.
textByHash.fb2294db9c9ee7bc4b2a39571fdaf6f66823a99d: Let's see... Thread that through there...
